summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Defense Industry Dashboard - both backend APIs and frontend UI functionality are working correctly with minor chart rendering warnings

ui_bugs.issue: Chart components showing width(-1) and height(-1) warnings in console
ui_bugs.description: Charts render correctly but show console warnings about invalid dimensions. Likely timing issue with container sizing.

passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - All 35 API endpoints working (100% success)
Authentication flow - Registration, login, and JWT token handling
Dashboard metrics display - Market cap, expenditure, players, M&A counts
All page navigation - Dashboard, Announcements, M&A, Market Data, Expenditures, Regulations, Products
Search functionality on all pages with filters
Chart and table rendering on all pages
Admin panel access control and CRUD operations
Data filtering by category, status, country, region
Product portfolio grid and modal details
Market data visualization and player details

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working with minor chart warnings

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer sizing warnings in chart components. Charts render correctly but show console warnings about invalid dimensions (-1 width/height). Consider adding explicit container dimensions or minWidth/minHeight properties to ResponsiveContainer components.
